name: Sae Itoshi
description:
Teenage pregnancy.

—author's yapping

hi everyonee! i completely forgot about this bot and didn't expect it to blow up this much. i initially made this for my friend and for her to have some fun. i had some mediocre writing skills (till now) when i made this, so i thought i would like to add a bit more stuff in the first message. i also added more info at his personality, to make it even more like you're talking to Sae himself.

i'd like to thank you all for using my bot, and maybe in the future, i'll add more. maybe tokrev, one piece, wind breaker, haikyuu? anyway, don't be shy and share your chats! i won't judge, i'm curious what's happening there. also, feel free to request me some bots!
creator: dearestei
